text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her performance, Silence<n>Suzuka thanks the
audience and<n>stands still for a time, basking in the
words of her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her kindles a wish in me—that
<chrname> will be just as<n>encouraged by
her fans' voices.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Light Hello renews her<n>determination.
She makes it her next<n>mission to persuade all
parties of the<n>Grand Concert's importance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first step will be to address the<n>student body
at Tracen Academy.
